title: Refrigerated Russian Kvass Dumplings
description: A traditional Russian recipe made with a combination of yeast, kvass, and soda water, creating a light and fluffy dumpling with a hint of bitterness and a nod to nostalgia.

ingredients.name: yeast
ingredients.notes: make sure yeast is at room temperature

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and yeast; mix until just combined
Gradually add salt and mix until dough forms
Transfer dough to a salt block and proof in a warm place for 1 hour
Punch down dough and divide into 8-10 equal pieces
Roll out each piece into a thin circle
Place 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter in the center of each circle and fold dough over to form a triangle
Press edges to seal dumplings and place on a lightly floured surface
Place dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and cover with plastic wrap
Refrigerate dumplings for at least 4 hours or overnight
Remove dumplings from refrigerator and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Brush tops with beaten egg for a golden glaze
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown
